claim_scope: Internet Archive metadata for the LithTech Jupiter build 51 item, including identifier, publication date, package description, collection placement, and original file fixity.
notes: Internet Archive metadata identifies the item as LithTech Jupiter by Monolith Productions, dated 2002-03-19, with identifier lithengine. The IA usage tag is recorded as metadata only; the development guide legal notice keeps this repo in a rights-review posture.
